mnemonics: Make It Simple, Stupid (MIS) - Focus on simplicity and clarity
Help Your Team Succeed (HYTS) - Prioritize team success and collaboration
keyPoints: Agility is an iterative and adaptive approach to project management
Emphasis on flexibility, customer satisfaction, and continuous improvement
Break down work into smaller, manageable tasks and deliver in short sprints
Regular feedback and retrospectives to improve processes and team performance
Customer involvement and prioritization of requirements throughout the project
